title: To organise templates in templates center
excerpt: Our company has hundreds of templates and hence it will be good to be able to organize and categorize custom templates.

posts.author: siingyii (SY)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company has hundreds of templates and hence it will be good to be able to organize and categorize custom templates.

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
@siingyii ,

Our team uses many templates as well. What we did was create a workspace called “Templates” and all templates that are created stay in the Templates workspace. This cleans up the Main Workspace and allows you to create folders and sub folders to organize templates in the dedicated Templates Workspace.

posts.author: siingyii (SY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kayla, we tried that. But we will not be able to find the template/document under the “File” column unless it’s created as a template in Templates center.

image1252×318 38.5 KB

image1707×700 93.3 KB

posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. Being able to only filter by user is not very helpful for our users who don’t necessarily know/understand the history or creation of our templates. I suggest being able to filter by the workspace a template was “created in” as that will be a more helpful way for our lower level users to identify the templates they need to use.
